texto: ...the truth of the matter is that we've all got cracks in our spirits, and we have to remember they're only there because we need them.... Otherwise, how could God's grace filter in deep enough to give us the joy and peace we're all searching for in this world. It couldn't, plain and simple.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Delia Parr sobre temas ligados a fe. A afirmação “...the truth of the matter is that we've all got cracks in our spirits, and we have to remember t…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, god, inspiracional, útil em momentos de inspiracao e inspiracional.
